zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais於大約1010年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特時，她的父親Baudouin II de Clermont22歲，母親Adele Champagne24歲。她於1029年與Renaud de Clermont de Creil I在法國皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1050年在法國皮卡迪奧易可爾享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais于大约1010年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特时，她的父亲Baudouin II de Clermont22岁，母亲Adele Champagne24岁。她于1029年与Renaud de Clermont de Creil I在法国皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1050年在法国皮卡迪奧易可爾享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: clermont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ermengarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais was born about 1010, in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Baudouin II de Clermont, was 22 and her mother, Adele Champagne, was 24. She married Renaud de Clermont de Creil I in 1029, in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1050, in Creil, Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais est née environ 1010, à Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Baudouin II de Clermont, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Adele Champagne, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Renaud de Clermont de Creil I en 1029, à Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1050, à Creil, Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais um 1010 in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin II de Clermont 22 und ihre Mutter Adele Champagne 24. Sie hat 1029 in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich Renaud de Clermont de Creil I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1050 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Creil, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais è nata il circa 1010 nel Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Baudouin II de Clermont, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Adele Champagne, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Renaud de Clermont de Creil I nel 1029, nel Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1050, nel Creil, Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de clermont en beauvaisが約1010年にフランスピカーディオイゼクラーモントで生まれた時，父Baudouin II de Clermontは22歳，母Adele Champagneは24歳であった。1029年にフランスピカーディオイゼクラーモントでRenaud de Clermont de Creil Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1050年にフランスピカーディオイゼクレイルで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais(이)가 대략 1010년 프랑스 피카디 이스 클레몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin II de Clermont(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adele Champagne(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1029년 프랑스 피카디 이스 클레몽에서 Renaud de Clermont de Creil I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1050년 프랑스 피카디 이스 크레일에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais nasceu aproximadamente 1010, em Clermont, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Baudouin II de Clermont, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Adele Champagne, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Renaud de Clermont de Creil I em 1029, em Clermont, Oise, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1050, em Creil, Oise, Picardie, França, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais родилась около 1010 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Baudouin II de Clermont было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Adele Champagne, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Renaud de Clermont de Creil I в 1029 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1050 г. в местности крил, оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais nació aproximadamente 1010, en Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Baudouin II de Clermont, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Adele Champagne, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Renaud de Clermont de Creil I en 1029, en Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1050, en Creil, Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 41 años.
